description: Thin crepes folded into triangles and served with a simple buttery orange sauce.
steps: Combine all crepe ingredients in a blender and pulse for 10 seconds. Optionally refrigerate for 1 hour to allow bubbles to subside.
Heat a 7" and 10" frying pan over medium heat for about 5 minutes. Butter the 7" pan.
Pour 1/4 cup batter into the 7" pan and swirl to spread evenly.
Cook for 2 minutes until the top is set, then loosen and flip into the buttered 10" pan.
Cook for another 30 seconds and transfer to a plate.
Once cooled, fold each crepe in half twice to form a triangle.
For the sauce: combine all sauce ingredients in a 10" skillet over medium-low heat until butter melts and sauce thickens, about 5 minutes.
Serve crepes with sauce drizzled over or by soaking each crepe in sauce for about 30 seconds. Optionally top with vanilla ice cream.
